title: How to Use AI to Stress-Test Your Ideas and Strategies
description: You do not need an IDE, an MCP, or any complex setup. Just a chat window and a willingness to be wrong.
globalInfo: Source: Nathan Mapp, CPA — LinkedIn post (2026-03-28).

modules.title: Why AI is Uniquely Good at This
modules.description: Understanding why LLMs make great sparring partners for your ideas

steps.title: All You Need is a Chat Window
steps.content: One of the most impactful things you can use AI to do right now is battle-test your assumptions.

steps.title: Token Prediction = Logical Extrapolation
steps.content: LLMs predict the next token, so they function well at running concepts to their logical conclusion. But they also have sycophancy baked in.

modules.title: The Reverse-Position Method
modules.description: How to trick AI past its sycophancy to get genuine pushback

steps.title: The Key Trick: Flip Your Position
steps.content: Approach the AI with a viewpoint OPPOSING your own. By flipping your position, you weaponize the sycophancy.

steps.title: What You Will Get Out of It
steps.content: Three possible outcomes: you become convinced you were wrong, you strengthen your ideas, or you learn a new perspective.

modules.title: Quick-Start Prompts You Can Use Today
modules.description: Ready-to-use persona prompts for stress-testing any decision

steps.title: Persona Prompts for Any Situation
steps.content: For product decisions: What would a jaded prospective customer say? For financial: What would a risk-averse investor say? Zero setup required.
